description: You are a Business Intelligence Analyst preparing a quarterly compensation review for HR leadership. Write an analytical SQL query using the HR schema (connected to XEPDB1) to produce a departmental salary analysis report. The query must return exactly nine columns: EMPLOYEE_NAME (combined first and last), DEPARTMENT_NAME, JOB_TITLE, SALARY, DEPT_SALARY_RANK (rank within department by salary descending using DENSE_RANK()), DEPT_AVG_SALARY (average salary of the department rounded to 2 decimals), SALARY_VS_AVG (SALARY minus DEPT_AVG_SALARY, rounded to 2 decimals), MANAGER_NAME (manager's full name or 'No Manager'), and DEPT_CUMULATIVE_SALARY (running sum of salary within department, ordered by salary descending). Filter the results to only include departments with more than 3 employees, and order the output by DEPARTMENT_NAME ascending, then by DEPT_SALARY_RANK ascending. Save the SQL script to ~/Documents/sql_scripts/dept_salary_analysis.sql and export the query results to ~/Documents/exports/dept_salary_report.csv.
